title: RNA Viruses and Hepatitis C — Material Completeness Fixture

overview.body: Self-study fixture for Sprint 62 renderer material completeness.

activities.title: Classify RNA Virus Genomes
activities.learner_task: Study the exposition, worked example, classification table, and checklist.
activities.expected_output: Completed classification table and verified checklist.

materials.title: S62 RNA A1-M1 RNA Genome Overview
materials.body: Marker S62-RNA-A1-M1-BODY. RNA viruses carry RNA genomes that may be positive-sense, negative-sense, or double-stranded.

materials.title: S62 RNA A1-M2 Worked Classification
materials.body: Marker S62-RNA-A1-M2-BODY. Step 1: identify genome polarity before assigning virus family.

materials.title: S62 RNA A1-M3 Sample Classification
materials.body: Marker S62-RNA-A1-M3-BODY. HCV is a positive-sense single-stranded RNA virus.

materials.title: S62 RNA A1-M4 Classification Table
materials.body:
| Genome type | Example virus | Marker S62-RNA-A1-M4-BODY
| --- | --- | --- |
| Positive-sense | HCV | S62-RNA-A1-M4-ROW |
| Negative-sense | Influenza A |  |

materials.title: S62 RNA A1-M5 Classification Checklist
materials.body:
- Criterion S62-RNA-A1-M5-C1: genome polarity named
- Criterion S62-RNA-A1-M5-C2: example virus matched

activities.title: Analyse HCV Replication Steps
activities.learner_task: Complete the analysis table using the worked example.
activities.expected_output: Completed analysis table verified with checklist.

materials.title: S62 RNA A2-M1 Replication Overview
materials.body: Marker S62-RNA-A2-M1-BODY. HCV replication occurs on membranous webs in the cytoplasm.

materials.title: S62 RNA A2-M2 Worked Replication Analysis
materials.body: Marker S62-RNA-A2-M2-BODY. Trace entry, translation, replication, and assembly in order.

materials.title: S62 RNA A2-M3 Analysis Table
materials.body:
| Step | Host factor | Viral product | Marker S62-RNA-A2-M3-BODY
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Entry | SR-B1 | E1/E2 | S62-RNA-A2-M3-ROW |
| Replication |  | NS5B |  |

materials.title: S62 RNA A2-M4 Analysis Checklist
materials.body:
- Criterion S62-RNA-A2-M4-C1: causal order preserved
- Criterion S62-RNA-A2-M4-C2: host and viral roles distinguished

activities.title: Plan an Outbreak Response
activities.learner_task: Read the scenario and complete the planning table.

materials.title: S62 RNA A3-M1 Response Framing
materials.body: Marker S62-RNA-A3-M1-BODY. Outbreak response planning balances containment and healthcare capacity.

materials.title: S62 RNA A3-M2 Outbreak Scenario
materials.body: Marker S62-RNA-A3-M2-BODY. A regional hospital cluster shows rising HCV RNA-positive cases linked to dialysis exposure.

materials.title: S62 RNA A3-M3 Planning Table
materials.body:
| Action | Rationale | Marker S62-RNA-A3-M3-BODY
| --- | --- | --- |
| Screen contacts | Interrupt transmission | S62-RNA-A3-M3-ROW |
| Reinforce PPE | Reduce exposure |  |

materials.title: S62 RNA A3-M4 Planning Checklist
materials.body:
- Criterion S62-RNA-A3-M4-C1: actions sequenced logically
- Criterion S62-RNA-A3-M4-C2: rationale linked to evidence

activities.title: Analyse Immune Evasion Mechanisms
activities.learner_task: Use the modelling note and scenario to complete the analysis table.

materials.title: S62 RNA A4-M1 Immune Evasion Intro
materials.body: Marker S62-RNA-A4-M1-BODY. RNA viruses deploy multiple strategies to delay innate immune detection.

materials.title: S62 RNA A4-M2 Modelling Note
materials.body: Marker S62-RNA-A4-M2-BODY. Model innate sensing as a race between viral shielding and RIG-I activation.

materials.title: S62 RNA A4-M3 Evasion Scenario
materials.body: Marker S62-RNA-A4-M3-BODY. A variant shows reduced interferon-stimulated gene induction despite high viral load.

materials.title: S62 RNA A4-M4 Evasion Analysis Table
materials.body:
| Mechanism | Evidence cue | Marker S62-RNA-A4-M4-BODY
| --- | --- | --- |
| 5' UTR shielding | Delayed RIG-I signal | S62-RNA-A4-M4-ROW |
| NS3/4A protease | Reduced IRF3 |  |

materials.title: S62 RNA A4-M5 Evasion Checklist
materials.body:
- Criterion S62-RNA-A4-M5-C1: mechanism tied to evidence
- Criterion S62-RNA-A4-M5-C2: scenario details used

activities.title: Compare Treatment Strategies
activities.learner_task: Complete the analysis table comparing direct-acting antivirals.

materials.title: S62 RNA A5-M1 Treatment Overview
materials.body: Marker S62-RNA-A5-M1-BODY. Direct-acting antivirals target NS3, NS5A, and NS5B with distinct resistance profiles.

materials.title: S62 RNA A5-M2 Worked Comparison
materials.body: Marker S62-RNA-A5-M2-BODY. Compare mechanism, barrier to resistance, and pangenotypic coverage.

materials.title: S62 RNA A5-M3 Treatment Analysis Table
materials.body:
| Drug class | Target | Trade-off | Marker S62-RNA-A5-M3-BODY
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| NS5B polymerase inhibitor | NS5B | High barrier | S62-RNA-A5-M3-ROW |
| NS5A inhibitor | NS5A | Rapid decline |  |

materials.title: S62 RNA A5-M4 Treatment Checklist
materials.body:
- Criterion S62-RNA-A5-M4-C1: mechanisms distinguished
- Criterion S62-RNA-A5-M4-C2: trade-offs explicit

activities.title: Evaluate Outbreak Priorities
activities.learner_task: Complete the decision table, memo template, checklist, and transfer prompt.
activities.expected_output: Evaluative judgement memo and transfer response.

materials.title: S62 RNA A6-M1 Evaluation Framing
materials.body: Marker S62-RNA-A6-M1-BODY. Prioritise interventions using explicit criteria and trade-offs.

materials.title: S62 RNA A6-M2 Policy Scenario
materials.body: Marker S62-RNA-A6-M2-BODY. Limited testing capacity forces a choice between population screening and targeted contact tracing.

materials.title: S62 RNA A6-M3 Worked Judgement
materials.body: Marker S62-RNA-A6-M3-BODY. Worked judgement: weigh speed, coverage, and false-negative risk before recommending a priority.

materials.title: S62 RNA A6-M4 Decision Table
materials.body:
| Criterion | Option A | Option B | Marker S62-RNA-A6-M4-BODY
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Speed | Screening | Tracing | S62-RNA-A6-M4-ROW |
| Coverage |  |  |  |

materials.title: S62 RNA A6-M5 Evaluative Memo Template
materials.body:
Marker S62-RNA-A6-M5-BODY.

**Claim:** State your priority recommendation.

**Reasons:** Give two evidence-based reasons.

**Limits:** Name one uncertainty.

materials.title: S62 RNA A6-M6 Evaluation Checklist
materials.body:
- Criterion S62-RNA-A6-M6-C1: criteria applied explicitly
- Criterion S62-RNA-A6-M6-C2: trade-offs acknowledged

materials.title: S62 RNA A6-M7 Transfer Prompt
materials.body: Marker S62-RNA-A6-M7-BODY. Apply the same evaluation criteria to a different RNA-virus outbreak you know.
